overall.description: Ship bridge simulation at night showing navigation equipment and bow view as the vessel moves through dark waters. Features operational radar, electronic charts, and sonar displays typical of maritime training simulations.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station with forward viewing windows

events.description: red navigation marker light becomes visible on starboard side as vessel progresses

agents.ego_description: operating the ship's navigation systems and monitoring radar while cruising through coastal waters at night

entered.detail: electronic chart plotter showing navigation map with colored depth contours and restricted zones
circular radar display with rotating yellow sweep showing surrounding contacts
forward-looking sonar or depth profile showing underwater terrain
triangular bow of the vessel visible through the bridge windows with deck railings
metal safety railing on the port side of the bridge wing
metal safety railing on the starboard side of the bridge wing
dark water surface surrounding the vessel bow with subtle wave movement

segments.scene_description: View from a ship's bridge at night, showing three navigation monitors displaying radar, charts, and sonar. The vessel moves steadily through dark waters, with the bow structure visible through the forward windows. A red navigation marker appears briefly on the starboard side as the ship progresses through the harbor area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady forward progression from the interior of a ship's bridge through the dark waters of a harbor at night. It begins with a view of three glowing navigation monitors displaying radar, electronic charts, and sonar data, while the ship's bow is visible through the forward windows. As the vessel moves steadily ahead, the camera maintains its focus on the intersection of the digital displays and the dark exterior environment. The scene then shifts as a red navigation marker briefly appears on the starboard side, signaling the ship's passage through the harbor area before continuing into the darkness.
